steps.title: Connect skill to reception
steps.content: The final phrase says Cunningham's works were received as groundbreaking artworks. The blank must name a quality that explains that reception, not just another biographical fact.

steps.title: Reject weak connections
steps.content:
• Choice B gives a career fact but does not explain why the dance pieces were viewed as art.
  • Choice C mentions founding a company, which does not logically lead to that reception.
  • Choice D uses contrast where the passage needs support.

steps.title: Add the artistic reason
steps.content: Saying that Cunningham incorporated his principles with great skill and artistry explains why the work was seen as more than experimental spectacle. The answer is A.
